channel.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Model Maker - A transfer learning library that simplifies the process of training, evaluation and deployment for TensorFlow Lite models (support: Image Classification, Object Detection, Text Classification, BERT Question Answer, Audio Classification, Recommendation etc.; API reference).

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Sarus TF2 Modelsstars33 - A long list of recent generative models implemented in clean, easy to reuse, Tensorflow 2 code (Plain Autoencoder, VAE, VQ-VAE, PixelCNN, Gated PixelCNN, PixelCNN++, PixelSNAIL, Conditional Neural Processes).

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Dec 2nd - Dec 8th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

  • DeepBaystars4 - High-Level Keras Complement for implement common architectures stacks, served as easy to use plug-n-play modules

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • TF-Unetstars1 - General purpose U-Network implemented in Keras for image segmentation

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
Tools/Utilities

  • ML Workspacestars1.9k - All-in-one web IDE for machine learning and data science. Combines Tensorflow, Jupyter, VS Code, Tensorboard, and many other tools/libraries into one Docker image.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Convolutional Neural Networks in TensorFlow - Convolutional Neural Networks in Tensorflow, offered by Coursera

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

  • StellarGraphstars1.9k - Machine Learning on Graphs, a Python library for machine learning on graph-structured (network-structured) data.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Ladder Networkstars85 - Implementation of Ladder Network for Semi-Supervised Learning in Keras and Tensorflow

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 11th - Feb 17th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

  • TensorIO - Lightweight, cross-platform library for deploying TensorFlow Lite models to mobile devices.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Understanding The Tensorflow Estimator API A conceptual overview of the Estimator API, when you'd use it and why.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Nov 26th - Dec 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

  • pytorch2kerasstars698 - Convert PyTorch models to Keras (with TensorFlow backend) format
  • gluon2kerasstars8 - Convert Gluon models to Keras (with TensorFlow backend) format

    • Models/Projects

  • Hierarchical Attention Networksstars75 - TensorFlow implementation of "Hierarchical Attention Networks for Document Classification"

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Tools/Utilities

  • Guild AI - Task runner and package manager for TensorFlow

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

  • tf-encryptedstars860 - Layer on top of TensorFlow for doing machine learning on encrypted data

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

  • TensorFlow Estimators - high-level TensorFlow API that greatly simplifies machine learning programming (originally tensorflow/skflowstars3.2k)
  • R Interface to TensorFlow - R interface to TensorFlow APIs, including Estimators, Keras, Datasets, etc.

    • Papers

  • TensorFlow Estimators: Managing Simplicity vs. Flexibility in High-Level Machine Learning Frameworks

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • TensorNetsstars985 - 40+ Popular Computer Vision Models With Pre-trained Weights.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Aug 20th - Aug 26th, 2018
item.description:
Blog posts

  • Official Tensorflow Blog

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • MusicGenreClassificationstars382 - Classify music genre from a 10 second sound stream using a Neural Network.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • TensorFlow Tutorial 3stars8.8k - These tutorials are intended for beginners in Deep Learning and TensorFlow with well-documented code and YouTube videos.

    • Models/Projects

  • Kubeflowstars10.3k - Framework for easily using Tensorflow with Kubernetes.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 19th - Feb 25th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • TensorLayer - Modular implementation for TensorFlow's official tutorials. (CN).

    • Models/Projects

  • SRGANstars2.5k - Photo-Realistic Single Image Super-Resolution Using a Generative Adversarial Network
  • Seq2seq-Chatbotstars785 - Chatbot in 200 lines of code
  • DCGANstars289 - Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Networks
  • GAN-CLSstars509 -Generative Adversarial Text to Image Synthesis
  • im2imstars68 - Unsupervised Image to Image Translation with Generative Adversarial Networks
  • Improved CycleGANstars86 - Unpaired Image to Image Translation
  • DAGANstars134 - Fast Compressed Sensing MRI Reconstruction
  • Policy Gradient - For Playing Atari Ping Pong
  • Deep Q-Network - For Playing Frozen Lake Game
  • AC - Actor Critic for Playing Discrete Action space Game (Cartpole)
  • A3C - Asynchronous Advantage Actor Critic (A3C) for Continuous Action Space (Bipedal Walker)
  • DAGGERstars60 - For Playing Gym Torcsstars363
  • TRPOstars45 - For Continuous and Discrete Action Space by
  • U-Netstars414 - For Brain Tumor Segmentation
  • Spatial Transformer Networksstars38 - Learn the Transformation Function

    • Libraries

  • TensorLayerstars6.6k - Deep learning and reinforcement learning library for researchers and engineers

    • Papers

  • TensorLayer: A Versatile Library for Efficient Deep Learning Development - This paper describes a versatile Python library that aims at helping researchers and engineers efficiently develop deep learning systems. (Winner of The Best Open Source Software Award of ACM MM 2017)

    • Books

  • Deep Learning using TensorLayer - by Hao Dong et al. This book covers both deep learning and the implmentation by using TensorFlow and TensorLayer.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 12th - Feb 18th, 2018
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Tensorflow-Project-Templatestars3.4k - A simple and well-designed template for your tensorflow project.

    • Blog posts

  • How Does The TensorFlow Work How Does The Machine Learning Library TensorFlow Work?

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jan 8th - Jan 14th, 2018
item.description:
Videos

  • Image recognition in Go using TensorFlow - by Alex Pliutau

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jan 1st - Jan 7th, 2018
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Tensorflow FastTextstars294 - A simple embedding based text classifier inspired by Facebook's fastText.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Effective Tensorflowstars8.7k - TensorFlow howtos and best practices. Covers the basics as well as advanced topics.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Blog posts

  • Why TensorFlow will change the Game for AI
  • Coca-Cola's Image Recognition App Coca-Cola's product code image recognizing neural network with user input feedback loop.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

  • Latticestars465 - Implementation of Monotonic Calibrated Interpolated Look-Up Tables in TensorFlow
  • TensorForcestars2.9k - TensorForce: A TensorFlow library for applied reinforcement learning

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Unsupervised Object Countingstars82 - Implementation of "Attend, Infer, Repeat"

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Sep 4th - Sep 10th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Holographic Embeddings for Graph Completion and Link Predictionstars0 - Implementation of Holographic Embeddings of Knowledge Graphs

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Aug 28th - Sep 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Attentive Object Trackingstars150 - Implementation of "Hierarchical Attentive Recurrent Tracking"

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Aug 14th - Aug 20th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Neural machine translation between the writings of Shakespeare and modern English using TensorFlowstars246 - This performs a monolingual translation, going from modern English to Shakespeare and vice-versa.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Videos

  • Tensorflow and deep learning - without at PhD, Part 2 (Google Cloud Next '17) - by Martin Görner

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jul 17th - Jul 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Lip Reading - Cross Audio-Visual Recognition using 3D Architectures in TensorFlowstars1.6k - TensorFlow Implementation of "Cross Audio-Visual Recognition in the Wild Using Deep Learning" by Torfi et al.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Community

  • @TensorFlow on Twitter

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jun 19th - Jun 25th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • 3D Convolutional Neural Networks in TensorFlowstars708 - Implementation of "3D Convolutional Neural Networks for Speaker Verification application" in TensorFlow by Torfi et al.

    • Tutorials

  • TensorFlow Worldstars4.5k - Concise and ready-to-use TensorFlow tutorials with detailed documentation are provided.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jun 5th - Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Show, Attend and Tellstars873 - Attention Based Image Caption Generator
  • GoogleNet Convolutional Neural Network Groups Movie Scenes By Settingstars353 - Search, filter, and describe videos based on objects, places, and other things that appear in them
  • Colornet - Neural Network to colorize grayscale imagesstars3.6k - Neural Network to colorize grayscale images

    • Tutorials

  • CS20 SI: TensorFlow for DeepLearning Research - Stanford Course about Tensorflow from 2017 - Syllabus - Unofficial Videos

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • VGAN Tensorflowstars14 - Tensorflow implementation for MIT "Generating Videos with Scene Dynamics" by Vondrick et al.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 22nd - May 28th, 2017
item.description:
Blog posts

  • TensorFlow Optimizations on Modern Intel® Architecture - Introduces TensorFlow optimizations on Intel® Xeon® and Intel® Xeon Phi™ processor-based platforms based on an Intel/Google collaboration.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

  • tensorpackstars6k - Neural Network Toolbox on TensorFlow focusing on training speed and on large datasets.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 1st - May 7th, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • Machine Learning with TensorFlow by Nishant Shukla, computer vision researcher at UCLA and author of Haskell Data Analysis Cookbook. This book makes the math-heavy topic of ML approachable and practicle to a newcomer.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Single Image Random Dot Stereogramsstars4 - SIRDS is a means to present 3D data in a 2D image. It allows for scientific data display of a waterfall type plot with no hidden lines due to perspective.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

  • Sonnetstars8.9k - Sonnet is DeepMind's library built on top of TensorFlow for building complex neural networks.

    • Tutorials

  • Predict time seriesstars914 - Learn to use a seq2seq model on simple datasets as an introduction to the vast array of possibilities that this architecture offers

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • CNN visualization using Tensorflowstars770 - Tensorflow implementation of "Visualizing and Understanding Convolutional Networks"

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

  • NNFlowstars7 - Simple framework allowing to read-in ROOT NTuples by converting them to a Numpy array and then use them in Google Tensorflow.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017
item.description:
Blog posts

  • TensorFlow Android Guide - Android TensorFlow Machine Learning Example.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Getting Started with TensorFlow on Android - Build your first TensorFlow Android app

    • Libraries

  • TensorFlowOnSparkstars3.7k - initiative from Yahoo! to enable distributed TensorFlow with Apache Spark.

    • Blog posts

  • TFRecords Guide semantic segmentation and handling the TFRecord file format.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Books

  • TensorFlow for Machine Intelligence - Complete guide to use TensorFlow from the basics of graph computing, to deep learning models to using it in production environments - Bleeding Edge Press

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • AlexNet3Dstars40 - An implementations of AlexNet3D. Simple AlexNet model but with 3D convolutional layers (conv3d).

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jan 16th - Jan 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Domain Transfer Networkstars853 - Implementation of Unsupervised Cross-Domain Image Generation

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jan 2nd - Jan 8th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

  • keras-jsstars4.8k - Run Keras models (tensorflow backend) in the browser, with GPU support

    • Books

  • Building Machine Learning Projects with Tensorflow – by Rodolfo Bonnin. This book covers various projects in TensorFlow that expose what can be done with TensorFlow in different scenarios. The book provides projects on training models, machine learning, deep learning, and working with various neural networks. Each project is an engaging and insightful exercise that will teach you how to use TensorFlow and show you how layers of data can be explored by working with Tensors.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Dec 26th - Jan 1st, 2016
item.description:
Powered by TensorFlow

  • android-yolostars606 - Real-time object detection on Android using the YOLO network, powered by TensorFlow.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Papers

  • TF.Learn: TensorFlow's High-level Module for Distributed Machine Learning

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Nov 28th - Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • Tensorflow and deep learning - without at PhD - by Martin Görner

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Tutorials

  • TensorFlow Tutorial 2stars5.9k - Introduction to deep learning based on Google's TensorFlow framework. These tutorials are direct ports of Newmu's Theano

    • Models/Projects

  • Neural Stylestars2.8k Implementation of Neural Style
  • Pretty Tensorstars1.2k - Pretty Tensor provides a high level builder API
  • Neural Stylestars5.4k - An implementation of neural style
  • NeuralArtstars486 - Implementation of A Neural Algorithm of Artistic Style

    • Libraries

  • tflearnstars9.5k - Deep learning library featuring a higher-level API

    • Videos

  • Why Google wants everyone to have access to TensorFlow

    • Blog posts

  • The indico Machine Learning Team's take on TensorFlow
  • Using TensorBoard to Visualize Image Classification Retraining in TensorFlow

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Oct 24th - Oct 30th, 2016
item.description:
Blog posts

  • RNNs In TensorFlow, A Practical Guide And Undocumented Features - Step-by-step guide with full code examples on GitHub.

    • Models/Projects

  • Mnemonic Descent Methodstars120 - Tensorflow implementation of "Mnemonic Descent Method: A recurrent process applied for end-to-end face alignment"
  • DQN-tensorflowstars2.2k - TensorFlow implementation of DeepMind's 'Human-Level Control through Deep Reinforcement Learning' with OpenAI Gym by Devsisters.com
  • Highway Networkstars58 - TensorFlow implementation of "Training Very Deep Networks" with a blog post
  • Sentence Classification with CNNstars5.4k - TensorFlow implementation of "Convolutional Neural Networks for Sentence Classification" with a blog post
  • Character-Aware Neural Language Modelsstars739 - TensorFlow implementation of Character-Aware Neural Language Models
  • YOLO TensorFlow ++stars5.9k - TensorFlow implementation of 'YOLO: Real-Time Object Detection', with training and an actual support for real-time running on mobile devices.

    • Tutorials

  • Classification on time seriesstars2.8k - Recurrent Neural Network classification in TensorFlow with LSTM on cellphone sensor data

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2016
item.description:
Books

  • Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn and TensorFlow – by Aurélien Geron, former lead of the YouTube video classification team. Covers ML fundamentals, training and deploying deep nets across multiple servers and GPUs using TensorFlow, the latest CNN, RNN and Autoencoder architectures, and Reinforcement Learning (Deep Q).

    • Models/Projects

  • Wavenetstars5.1k - This is a TensorFlow implementation of the WaveNet generative neural network architecture for audio generation.

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Books

  • Getting Started with TensorFlow - Get up and running with the latest numerical computing library by Google and dive deeper into your data, by Giancarlo Zaccone

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Chatbotstars2.8k - Implementation of "A neural conversational model"

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2016
item.description:
Blog posts

  • TensorFlow - Not Just For Deep Learning

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

  • tensorflow.rbstars829 - TensorFlow native interface for ruby using SWIG

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2016
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • End-To-End Memory Networksstars338 - Implementation of End-To-End Memory Networks

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2016
item.description:
Blog posts

  • Building Machine Learning Estimator in TensorFlow - Understanding the Internals of TensorFlow Learn Estimators

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Sungjoon's TensorFlow-101stars2.5k - TensorFlow tutorials written in Python with Jupyter Notebook

    • Papers

  • TensorFlow: A system for large-scale machine learning - This paper describes the TensorFlow dataflow model in contrast to existing systems and demonstrate the compelling performance

    • Blog posts

  • Fizz Buzz in TensorFlow - A joke by Joel Grus

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • Large Scale Deep Learning with TensorFlow - Spark Summit 2016 Keynote by Jeff Dean

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • Diving into Machine Learning through TensorFlow - Pycon 2016 Portland Oregon, Slide & Codestars629 by Julia Ferraioli, Amy Unruh, Eli Bixby

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 30th - Jun 5th, 2016
item.description:
Powered by TensorFlow

  • Magentastars16.6k - Research project to advance the state of the art in machine intelligence for music and art generation

    • Tutorials

  • Terry Um’s TensorFlow Exercisesstars587 - Re-create the codes from other TensorFlow examples
  • Installing TensorFlow on Raspberry Pi 3stars2.1k - TensorFlow compiled and running properly on the Raspberry Pi

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Books

  • First Contact with TensorFlow by Jordi Torres, professor at UPC Barcelona Tech and a research manager and senior advisor at Barcelona Supercomputing Center
  • Deep Learning with Python - Develop Deep Learning Models on Theano and TensorFlow Using Keras by Jason Brownlee

    • Libraries

  • TensorFramesstars766 - TensorFlow binding for Apache Spark

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 9th - May 15th, 2016
item.description:
Blog posts

  • The Good, Bad, & Ugly of TensorFlow - A survey of six months rapid evolution (+ tips/hacks and code to fix the ugly stuff), Dan Kuster at Indico, May 9, 2016

    • Videos

  • Stanford CS224d Lecture 7 - Introduction to TensorFlow, 19th Apr 2016 - CS224d Deep Learning for Natural Language Processing by Richard Socher

    • Libraries

  • SyntaxNet: Neural Models of Syntax - A TensorFlow implementation of the models described in Globally Normalized Transition-Based Neural Networks, Andor et al. (2016)
  • keras - Minimal, modular deep learning library for TensorFlow and Theano
  • caffe-tensorflowstars2.8k - Convert Caffe models to TensorFlow format

    • Papers

  • Globally Normalized Transition-Based Neural Networks - This paper describes the models behind SyntaxNet.

    • Official announcements

  • Announcing SyntaxNet: The World’s Most Accurate Parser Goes Open Source - Release of SyntaxNet, "an open-source neural network framework implemented in TensorFlow that provides a foundation for Natural Language Understanding systems.

    • Models/Projects

  • DeepOSMstars1.3k - Train TensorFlow neural nets with OpenStreetMap features and satellite imagery.
  • Neural Caption Generatorstars507 - Implementation of "Show and Tell"
  • Neural Caption Generator with Attentionstars507 - Implementation of "Show, Attend and Tell"
  • Weakly_detectorstars353 - Implementation of "Learning Deep Features for Discriminative Localization"
  • Dynamic Capacity Networksstars8 - Implementation of "Dynamic Capacity Networks"
  • HMM in TensorFlowstars284 - Implementation of viterbi and forward/backward algorithms for HMM

    • Powered by TensorFlow

  • YOLO TensorFlowstars1.7k - Implementation of 'YOLO : Real-Time Object Detection'

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Blog posts

  • TensorFlow for Poets - Goes over the implementation of TensorFlow
  • Introduction to Scikit Flow - Simplified Interface to TensorFlow - Key Features Illustrated

    • Libraries

  • TensorFlow-Slim - High-level library for defining models

    • Community

  • Reddit

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 25th - May 1st, 2016
item.description:
Community

  • Mailing List

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2016
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Neural Turing Machine in TensorFlowstars1k - implementation of Neural Turing Machine

    • Videos

  • TensorFlow Guide 1 - A guide to installation and use
  • TensorFlow Basic Usage - A guide going over basic usage
  • TensorFlow Udacity Deep Learning - Basic steps to install TensorFlow for free on the Cloud 9 online service with 1Gb of data

    • Community

  • Stack Overflow

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Tutorials

  • TensorFlow Tutorial 1stars5.5k - From the basics to slightly more interesting applications of TensorFlow

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2016
item.description:
Models/Projects

  • Generative Handwriting Demo using TensorFlowstars678 - An attempt to implement the random handwriting generation portion of Alex Graves' paper

    • Videos

  • Videos from TensorFlow Silicon Valley Meet Up 1/19/2016
  • Videos from TensorFlow Silicon Valley Meet Up 1/21/2016

    • Papers

  • TensorFlow: Large-Scale Machine Learning on Heterogeneous Distributed Systems - This paper describes the TensorFlow interface and an implementation of that interface that we have built at Google
  • Comparative Study of Deep Learning Software Frameworks - The study is performed on several types of deep learning architectures and we evaluate the performance of the above frameworks when employed on a single machine for both (multi-threaded) CPU and GPU (Nvidia Titan X) settings
  • Distributed TensorFlow with MPI - In this paper, we extend recently proposed Google TensorFlow for execution on large scale clusters using Message Passing Interface (MPI)

    • Official announcements

  • TensorFlow: smarter machine learning, for everyone - An introduction to TensorFlow

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • TensorFlow Guide 2 - Continuation of first video
  • TensorFlow Deep MNIST for Experts - Goes over Deep MNIST

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 29th - Mar 6th, 2016
item.description:
Tutorials

  • TensorFlow Examplesstars40.6k - TensorFlow tutorials and code examples for beginners

    • Models/Projects

  • TensorFlow White Paper Notesstars438 - Annotated notes and summaries of the TensorFlow white paper, along with SVG figures and links to documentation

item.title: jtoy/awesome-tensorflow Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
Credits

  • Some of the python libraries were cut-and-pasted from vintastars100k
  • The few go reference I found where pulled from this page
